body_txt: When humanoid aliens in visual fiction have hair, it almost always falls into one of the following styles:        These aliens' hair are also a Hair Substitute Feature if they're not actually hair. Can go with Hair as Cultural Identity , where scalp and facial hair styles have cultural significance and are part of cultural identity.
